title: Add Format and Last Viewed Date to Sidebar Detail Pane
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing report details, I want to see the report format and last viewed date in the sidebar, so that I understand the report type and recent usage at a glance.
description:
Adds Format and Last Viewed Date fields to the sidebar detail pane for reports and dashboards.

For reports, Format displays the Salesforce Report.Format value (e.g., "Matrix Report", "Tabular Report"). For dashboards, Format is hardcoded as "Dashboard". The Last Viewed Date shows the most recent time the item was accessed.
acceptance_criteria: Format field displays in the sidebar when a report is selected
Report format shows the actual Salesforce format type (e.g., Matrix Report)
Last Viewed Date is shown in the sidebar detail pane
ux_changes: Added Format and Last Viewed Date fields to the sidebar detail pane for both reports and dashboards.
implementation_notes: Data was already being stored in the database from MBT-789. This ticket added the display in the sidebar UI.
comment_summary: Balaji completed the sidebar additions. Waqar initially couldn't find them in the sidebar — Balaji shared a screenshot showing the placement.
